quotes.text: Surface codes remain the dominant modality, with logical qubit counts crossing 1000 in late 2025
quotes.attribution: synthesis of the QEC 2026 state of the field

quotes.text: Google demonstrated below-threshold operation on a 72-qubit Sycamore-class device
fault-tolerant quantum computing will require approximately 1 million physical qubits per logical qubit, down from earlier estimates of 10 million
